name: attendance-backend
description: Backend API for cloud-based attendance system

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" --names "NODE,FACE,VOICE" "nodemon server.js" "cmd /c set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn face_recognition_service:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --app-dir ../" "cmd /c set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn voice_recognition_service:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8081 --reload --app-dir ../"
scripts.dev:camera: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta,green" --names "NODE,FACE,VOICE,CAM" "nodemon server.js" "cmd /c set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn face_recognition_service:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --app-dir ../" "cmd /c set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn voice_recognition_service:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8081 --reload --app-dir ../" "cmd /c set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python ../live_camera_sync.py"
